SERVICE_ACCOUNT.description: Keyless-DWD service account email, e.g. gws-connector@PROJECT.iam.gserviceaccount.com. The postcreate hook creates it if missing, runs the service as it, and prints its Client ID to authorize in admin.google.com.

ADMIN_SUBJECT.description: Workspace super-admin to impersonate. ALSO permanently excluded from remediation (never act on the operator).

APP_ENV.description: prod (recommended) makes the DEV_LOGIN auth-bypass impossible. Leave as prod.

REMEDIATION_ADMINS.description: Comma emails authorized to run DESTRUCTIVE remediation (RBAC). Empty = only ADMIN_SUBJECT. Signing in alone does NOT grant remediation.

ALLOWED_DOMAIN.description: Admin sign-in restriction: only users of this Workspace org may log into the UI.

GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.description: OAuth Web client id for the admin sign-in (create a Web OAuth client in your project; redirect URI = the service URL + /auth/callback). Required — without it the UI has no sign-in.

GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET.description: OAuth Web client secret (from the same OAuth client as GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID).

DEFAULT_DOMAIN.description: Primary verified domain of the tenant (remediation is scoped to it).

FEED_API_KEY.description: SOCRadar feed API key. Entered here, then the postcreate hook moves it into Secret Manager and removes the plaintext env copy.

FEED_START_DATE.description: Fixed feed start date (YYYY-MM-DD) — used only if FEED_LOOKBACK_DAYS=0.

FEED_LOOKBACK_DAYS.description: Look back this many days on each scan (e.g. 7 = last week, 30 = last month). 0 = use the fixed start date. Keep bounded.

SCAN_TRIGGER_TOKEN.description: Shared secret for the headless /tasks/scan scheduler trigger (auto-generated).

STORAGE_BACKEND.description: sqlite (zero-config, ephemeral /tmp — default for the button) or firestore (durable; needs a pre-created Firestore DB + datastore.user on the runtime SA — use the gcloud script for that).

DB_PATH.description: SQLite file path (sqlite backend only). MUST be under /tmp — the container runs as a non-root user and cannot write the app dir.

PROJECT_ID.description: GCP project for firestore/bigquery. Empty = ADC default.

CLOSE_SOCRADAR_ALARM.description: true = after a Google remediation, resolve the originating SOCRadar alarm (write-back). true|false.

ANALYTICS_BIGQUERY.description: true = export scan/remediation events to BigQuery for Looker Studio. true|false.

REMEDIATION_MODE.description: manual | semi_auto | auto. manual = flag only (safest, default). semi_auto = one-click human apply per user. auto = apply automatically on scan (gated).

AUTO_ENABLED_ACTIONS.description: Comma allow-list of actions auto/semi may apply (e.g. signout,revoke_tokens). Empty = none. Do NOT include suspend.

AUTO_DRY_RUN.description: auto mode: true = log intended actions, execute NOTHING (turn off only after reviewing). true|false.

AUTO_KILL_SWITCH.description: true halts ALL autonomous actions immediately.

AUTO_HIGH_BLAST_ACTIONS.description: Comma actions that NEVER auto-fire even in auto mode (always need a human).

AUTO_MAX_USERS_PER_SCAN.description: Blast-radius cap: max users auto-actioned per scan.

AUTO_RATE_LIMIT_PER_HOUR.description: Circuit breaker: max auto actions/hour/tenant (0=off). Tripping halts the run.

REQUIRE_APPROVAL.description: true = high-blast actions (suspend/reset_password/disable_2sv) need a SECOND admin's approval (four-eyes).

APPROVAL_ACTIONS.description: Comma actions that require two-person approval.

AUDIT_HMAC_KEY.description: HMAC key for the tamper-evident audit chain (auto-generated). The postcreate hook moves it into Secret Manager and removes the plain env copy.
